args:
Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Core API Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/hono-base.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/client/client.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Core API Read/Write Ledger

## src/index.ts

- Public surface: Exports Hono class and types (Env, Handler, Context, Input, Schema, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions)
- Internal names noticed: Hono, blank module docstring with example usage
- Imports or neighbors: ./hono (class), ./types (types), ./context (Context), ./request (HonoRequest type), ./client (types)
- Plain-English summary: Module entry point that re-exports Hono framework class and related types for public consumption
- Copy-safe detail: This module serves as the main export interface, bundling together the Hono class and all type definitions into convenient re-exports for application developers.

## src/types.ts

- Public surface: Env, Variables, Bindings, Next, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, HTTPResponseError, TypedResponse, Input, Schema, ValidationTargets, ToSchema, ResponseFormat, KnownResponseFormat
- Internal names noticed: RouterRoute, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, BlankInput, ExtractInput, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, MergeEndpointParamsWithPath, AddParam, AddDollar, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, Endpoint, ExtractParams, ExtractSchema, IntersectNonAnyTypes, ProcessHead, FlattenIfIntersect, ParamKeys, ParamKeyToRecord, JsonValue, RemoveBlankRecord, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode
- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions module containing environment types, handler signatures, interface definitions, schema structures, and TypeScript utility types for type-safe Hono development
- Copy-safe detail: This module defines the complete type system for Hono including handler interfaces, environment bindings, validation targets, and complex utility types for schema transformation and type extraction.

## src/hono.ts

- Public surface: Hono class export
- Internal names noticed: HonoBase reference, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions
- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
- Plain-English summary: Main Hono framework class that extends HonoBase with default router configuration (SmartRouter combining RegExpRouter and TrieRouter)
- Copy-safe detail: This file provides the primary Hono class constructor with optional router configuration, instantiating SmartRouter with both RegExpRouter and TrieRouter for routing strategies.

## src/hono-base.ts

- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use, basePath, route, mount, onError, notFound, fetch, request, fire methods
- Internal names noticed: HonoBase class name, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, _basePath, #path, routes array, #clone, #dispatch, #addRoute, #handleError, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, COMPOSED_HANDLER
- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url, ./types
- Plain-English summary: Base Hono implementation class containing routing logic, handler registration methods, request dispatching, error handling, and middleware composition
- Copy-safe detail: This module implements the core routing and request handling logic with method-based route registration (get, post, etc.), error handlers, not-found handlers, and request dispatch through the router middleware chain.

## src/context.ts

- Public surface: Context class, event, executionCtx, res, req, var, set, get, header, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound, render, setLayout, getLayout methods
- Internal names noticed: #rawRequest, #req, #var, #status, #executionCtx, #res, #layout, #renderer, #notFoundHandler, #preparedHeaders, #matchResult, #path, #newResponse, DefaultRenderer, ContextOptions
- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/constants, ./utils/mime
- Plain-English summary: Request context class that manages per-request data, headers, status codes, environment bindings, and response creation methods (text, json, html, redirect)
- Copy-safe detail: This context class provides request-scoped data storage via get/set, response building methods, header management, status code setting, and access to the raw request object and matched route information.

## src/request.ts

- Public surface: HonoRequest class, raw, path, param, query, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath properties
- Internal names noticed: #validatedData, #matchResult, bodyCache, GET_MATCH_RESULT, cloneRawRequest
- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper class that provides convenient access to path parameters, query strings, headers, and body parsing (JSON, text, form data, blobs)
- Copy-safe detail: This module wraps the native Request object providing param/query access, header getters, body parsing methods with caching to support multiple reads of the same body, and validated data storage.

## src/request/constants.ts

- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol export
- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol
- Imports or neighbors: none (standalone constants file)
- Plain-English summary: Module exporting the GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol for type-safe access to route match information in HonoRequest
- Copy-safe detail: This file exports a unique symbol used to type-safe property access on HonoRequest for retrieving the router match result array structure.

## src/utils/body.ts

- Public surface: parseBody function, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions
- Internal names noticed: parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData
- Imports or neighbors: ../request, ./url (implied via Request)
- Plain-English summary: Utility module for parsing request bodies including multipart/form-data and form-urlencoded formats with dot notation and array support options
- Copy-safe detail: This utility parses form data from requests supporting the 'all' option for array fields and 'dot' option for nested objects via dot notation, with proper type definitions for complex nested structures.

## src/compose.ts

- Public surface: compose function
- Internal names noticed: dispatch, compose function, middleware array structure
- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
- Plain-English stack: Koa-style middleware composition that chains handlers together with error and not-found handler support
- Copy-safe detail: This module implements middleware composition similar to koa-compose, dispatching through handlers in sequence, capturing errors to a context.error field, and providing not-found fallback when handlers don't invoke next.

## src/http-exception.ts

- Public surface: HTTPException class
- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, getResponse, res property, status property
- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
- Plain-English summary: Exception class for throwing HTTP errors with status codes and optional pre-built responses
- Copy-safe detail: This HTTPException extends Error with status code and optional Response body support, providing getResponse() to materialize a Response object when the exception is caught by error handlers.

## src/client/index.ts

- Public surface: hc function export, parseResponse, DetailedError export, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, Fetch
- Internal names noticed: buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, ClientRequestImpl
- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types
- Plain-English summary: HTTP Client module providing hc() shorthand client creation and type inference utilities for typed API calls from Hono client
- Copy-safe detail: This module exports the hc() factory for creating proxy-based API clients with type inference, plus parseResponse for intelligent response parsing and error handling.

## src/client/client.ts

- Public surface: hc function, Client, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, HonoURL, BuildPath, BuildPathname, TypedURL, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, PickResponseByStatusCode, PickResponseByStatusCode, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferEndpointType, BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions
- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestImpl, createProxy, proxyCallback, deepMerge, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, replaceUrlProtocol, ExpandAllMethod, BuildSearch, IsEmptyObject, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, Callback, CallbackOptions, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickRoute, PickSchema, Response interface, Fetch type
- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types
- Plain-English summary: Client implementation providing hc() proxy-based API client with URL path building, parameter replacement, and typed response extraction
- Copy-safe detail: This module implements the hc() client factory using Proxy for method chaining, ClientRequestImpl for request construction with URL parameter substitution and query string building, plus extensive type definitions for typed API responses.

## src/client/types.ts

- Public surface: BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, HonoURL, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, ClientResponseOfEndpoint, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, PickResponseByStatusCode, PickResponseByStatusCode, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickRoute, PickSchema
- Internal names notice: ExpandAllMethod, StandardMethods, HonoURL, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, IsEmptyObject, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, CallbackOptions, Callback, TypedURL
- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types
- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for HTTP client including path building types, URL construction, typed response interfaces, and status code filtering utilities
- Copy-safe detail: This module defines the complete type system for the client including complex path-to-chain transformations, URL type construction with protocol/host/port/pathname/search properties, and response type inference utilities.

## src/client/utils.ts

- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse, DetailedError
- Internal names noticed: DetailedError class, nullBodyResponses set, detectResponseType function, jsonRegex, fetchRP function
- Imports or neighbors: ./fetch-result-please (fetchRP, DetailedError), ../utils/http-status
- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for URL manipulation, search parameter building, deep object merging, and response parsing
- Copy-safe detail: This module provides helper functions for client-side URL construction including protocol replacement, path merging, URL parameter substitution, search query building, and deep object merging for request options.

## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts

- Public surface: fetchRP function, DetailedError class
- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses set, detectResponseType function, jsonRegex pattern, DetailedError constructor
- Imports or neighbors: ./utils (fetchRP, DetailedError), ../utils/http-status
- Plain-English summary: Response parsing wrapper that detects JSON vs text content-type and throws DetailedError for non-2xx responses with structured error details
- Copy-safe detail: This module wraps fetch responses detecting content-type to parse JSON or text, checking for null body responses (101, 204, 205, 304), and throwing DetailedError with status code, status text, and response data for failed requests.

## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts

- Public surface: fire, handle exports
- Internal names noticed: fire function, handle function, FetchEvent reference
- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler, ./types
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter providing fire() for event listener registration and handle() for fetch event handler
- Copy-safe detail: This module adapts Hono applications for Service Worker environments by registering addEventListener('fetch') with the handle() function that passes the fetch event to app.fetch().

## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts

- Public surface: handle function, HandleOptions type
- Internal names noticed: fetch property, HandleOptions interface
- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./types
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker fetch handler that wraps app.fetch() and falls back to global fetch on 404 errors
- Copy-safe detail: This handler creates a fetch event listener that calls app.fetch() and returns the response, with fallback logic to use globalThis.fetch for 404 errors when configured in HandleOptions.

## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

- Public surface: FetchEvent interface
- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent extension, waitUntil, preloadResponse, handled, clientId, resultingClientId, respondWith
- Imports or neighbors: none (standalone types file)
- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for Service Worker FetchEvent interface extending standard ExtendableEvent
- Copy-safe detail: This file defines the FetchEvent interface for Service Workers with properties for clientId, resultingClientId, preloadResponse, handled promise, and methods for waitUntil and respondWith.

- src/hono.ts
